rules.reason: Existing public Supabase migrations may rely on active platform context and are not auto-applied to the disposable service-schema database.

entries.reason: Consolidated local-only Game Engine schema baseline for disposable database validation.
Consolidated local-only Auth Service schema baseline for disposable database validation.
Adds durable evaluation tables after the consolidated Game Engine baseline so the draft conflict is not applied blindly.
Adds local-only indexes required by database-backed Game Engine evaluation repositories.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service signing key storage for JWT/JWKS runtime validation.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service refresh-token storage for rotation, revocation, replay detection, and session binding.
Adds local-only durable Auth Service service-account/client-secret storage for service-to-service token issuance validation.
Adds local-only durable Settlement Service run and append-only record storage for recovery-safe validation.
Adds local-only durable, idempotent settlement ledger effects without enabling financial posting authority.
Adds local-only cashier, wallet, ledger, outbox, and atomic completion RPC surfaces for disposable financial completion validation.
Adds local-only durable financial worker event handling records for idempotent consumer validation.
Adds local-only Credit Wallet read baseline tables and summary RPC for durable service read validation without enabling credit service authority.
Adds local-only durable reserve and release RPCs for Credit Wallet Service mutation validation while CREDIT authority remains MONOLITH.
Adds local-only durable settlement application RPC for Credit Wallet Service mutation validation while CREDIT authority remains MONOLITH.
Replaces the local-only Credit Wallet settlement application RPC with fully qualified references so idempotent replay is deterministic.
Adds append-only local Game Manifest v1 and authority certificate chain storage for Outcome Authority governance contracts.
Adds append-only local Outcome DSL v1 strategy definition storage with primitive validation and forbidden math/paytable/RTP guards.
Adds append-only local Math Model v1 and Paytable v1 governance storage with RTP, payout, and forbidden RNG/outcome guards.
Corrects Math/Paytable governance so jurisdiction and certification are optional policy overlays, not required dependencies.
Adds append-only local production RNG provider contract and health/evidence storage without enabling outcome generation.
Adds append-only local dry-run Outcome Authority event and certificate storage while production outcome authority remains disabled.
Adds append-only local dry-run Math Authority evaluation event and certificate storage without financial settlement or ledger posting.
Adds append-only local Certification Pack v1 authority-chain export storage without enabling production signing or authority activation.
Adds append-only signing provider and certificate signature evidence storage without enabling production signing keys.
Adds append-only statistical validation and simulation evidence storage without enabling production Outcome Authority.
Adds append-only outcome custody and operational control evidence without enabling production Outcome Authority.
Adds append-only local Platform Management Foundation hierarchy storage for organizations, tenants, brands, and markets.
Adds append-only local website/domain management storage and active host-resolution foundation without DNS or routing automation.
Adds append-only local brand theme and asset reference storage without UI, uploads, CDN, or object storage integration.
Adds append-only local game availability matrix storage and effective-date-aware resolution without Game Engine activation.
Seeds durable Auth Service platform-management permission catalog and role governance metadata without redesigning RBAC.
Adds append-only lifecycle events, version supersession metadata, and lifecycle-aware platform resolution without update/delete endpoints.
Adds append-only Outcome Provider contracts and immutable Game Manifest provider bindings without enabling production outcome authority.
Adds append-only certified CSPRNG, entropy provider, and DRBG session evidence contracts without enabling production outcome generation.
Adds append-only Provably Fair provider, commit-reveal governance, nonce, and player verification receipt contracts without enabling production gameplay.
Adds append-only Outcome Provider runtime request and attempt evidence boundaries with advisory-lock support while production outcome generation remains disabled.
Allows durable fail-closed Outcome Provider runtime evidence when exact provider resolution fails, while preserving production generation disablement.
Allows accepted Certified CSPRNG dry-run/simulation runtime attempts while preserving production generation disablement and secret-material rejection.
Adds append-only Provably Fair runtime receipt, reveal, verification evidence, and dry-run attempt support while production authority remains disabled.
Phase 22.6A draft only; intentionally excluded from automatic execution.
Superseded for local disposable application by scripts/migrations/local/003_add_game_engine_evaluation_storage.sql.
Phase 23.2 draft only; consolidated local-only migration is used for disposable validation.

knownConflicts.resolution: Both drafts are excluded from automatic execution; local migrations create baseline tables first and add the evaluation storage shape once.
